creator: transitive@gmail.com
text:
The devel/qt5-core port fails to patch correctly.

The relevant portion of my poudriere log is as follows:

=======================<phase: patch          >============================
===>  Patching for qt5-core-5.10.1_1

===>  Applying extra patch /usr/ports/devel/qt5/files/extrapatch-mkspecs_common_bsd_bsd.conf
===>  Applying FreeBSD patches for qt5-core-5.10.1_1

Ignoring previously applied (or reversed) patch.
2 out of 2 hunks ignored--saving rejects to src/corelib/io/qlockfile_unix.cpp.rej
=> FreeBSD patch patch-src_corelib_io_qlockfile__unix.cpp failed to apply cleanly.
=> Patch(es)  patch-src_corelib_corelib.pro applied cleanly.
